title: Split overloaded sessions role into sessions / runtimes / surfaces

tests.note: committed correctness gate: asserts the 8-role order, the 6 moved fittings resolve to runtimes/surfaces, dev-env+artifact-store stay in sessions, and the legacy aliases fold to surfaces

fullSuite.note: the 2 failures are tests/orchestrator-integration.test.ts — live-gateway tests that run only when a real gateway answers on 127.0.0.1:4777 (one is up on this machine) and its /chat returned a null session_id. That is the running operative's chat runtime, unrelated to the faculty rename. Environmental + pre-existing.
